LanguageData.FCP_Culture_BoS.description: The Brotherhood of Steel maintains strict military discipline and a reverence for pre-war technology. Members follow the Codex, value the chain of command, and see themselves as preservers of knowledge in a barbaric world.
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_BoS.label: Brotherhood of Steel chapter
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_BoS_Outcasts.description: The Outcasts are purists who rejected Elder Lyons' deviation from the Codex. They are utterly dedicated to acquiring and preserving technology, viewing outsiders as obstacles at best. The mission is everything.
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_BoS_Outcasts.label: Brotherhood of Steel Outcasts
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_Lyons_BoS.description: Elder Lyons' chapter broke from the Codex to help the people of the Capital Wasteland. His followers combine Brotherhood discipline with compassion, believing that technology should serve humanity, not be hoarded from it.
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_Lyons_BoS.label: Brotherhood of Steel Lyons
